name: Model Router
description: Routes messages to the cheapest capable model based on complexity classification

simpleModel.description: Model ID for simple/FAQ messages (default: google/gemini-2.0-flash-exp)

complexModel.description: Model ID for code/analysis messages (default: anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5)

hardModel.description: Model ID for detailed analysis/essays (default: anthropic/claude-sonnet-4)

complexWordThreshold.description: Word count above which unclassified messages go to complex tier (default: 100)

hardWordThreshold.description: Minimum word count for hard classification (must also match patterns, default: 50)

simpleModel.label: Simple Model
simpleModel.help: Cheapest model for greetings, FAQs, short answers (~80% of messages)

complexModel.label: Complex Model
complexModel.help: Mid-tier model for code, analysis, reasoning (~15% of messages)

hardModel.label: Hard Model
hardModel.help: Premium model for detailed analysis, essays (~5% of messages)

backgroundModel.label: Background Model
backgroundModel.help: Budget model for summaries, digests, recaps

provider.label: Provider
provider.help: LLM provider to route all models through
